title: ADHD: half-remembered mention triggers a search, not a new reminder

turns.name: casey asks to find the half-remembered dentist note
turns.text: what was that dentist thing i said yesterday? i know i typed it somewhere, maybe in my messages. please don't make a new reminder yet — i don't even remember what it actually was, i just want to find it.
